header.description: Report metadata (Print Date, Title, Sheet ID). No dynamic tokens required in header based on schema.

rows.description: Time-series log of temperature sensor readings.

totals.description: No aggregate totals defined for this report.

semantics: All row tokens represent direct sensor readings. The timestamp token represents the measurement time. No derived calculations (like averages or differences) are required per row.
transformations: Format the timestamp column to 'DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS'.
Format all numeric sensor columns to 2 decimal places.
